Vendored: pydantic-deepagents
Upstream: https://github.com/vstorm-co/pydantic-deepagents
Commit:   f2224c5 (version 0.3.34)
Vendored: 2026-07-01
Patches:  patches/0001-branch-outcomes.patch (public ForkCoordinator.branch_outcomes accessor)
Notes:
  - .git and .venv removed from tree (kept only in a local, git-ignored, never-
    pushed parking dir): venvs are per-consumer, provenance lives here instead of
    a dead .git.
  - Runtime-dirs rule (exclude from the vendored tree on every re-vendor; they are
    machine-specific runtime output, not source):
      * apps/deepresearch/workspace(s)/
      * jobs/terminal-bench/**  — benchmark runtime logs (env details, paths,
        exception dumps). Excluded from Harness2 pre-commit (see EXCLUSIONS.md);
        revendor_check.py only compares pydantic_deep/**/*.py, so this exclusion
        is invisible to vendor integrity. Re-apply it on the next re-vendor.
  - On re-vendor: clone upstream, apply patches/, copy tree, run revendor_check.py
    then verify_core.py. Check upstream CHANGELOG.md for pydantic_ai.ui adoption
    before writing new UI glue (may shrink projects/agent-web).
